TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u sakaydihan naku kinaising! śąĎŤ∂ÖśĄõťÄôŚÄčťÜęÁĒü! kakiliman aku;ising, u tengil aku anumilatlat tu udip sa tanayu' kuni kaudip saan haw, tatenga haw? śąĎ: ? nilaculan ising; amana palawpes tu tuki i nipilatlat tu udip, anu mahida sa mabayu'. smilatlat tu udip kalamkam ku nitatebut nu balucu' cay pakatenes kuni kaudip, mahida anu kalamkam kuni pacilil isu tu kadudeng sac kalamkam mapeci tu ku kadideng ťÜęÁĒü: ? anu maydih matyseng kunikaudip sa, kabi tu kalahukam! amu; mahica satang han kunika tupah? śąĎ: ? ising: u caay. u budu a epah. Pay-lan-ti nu heci amin nihudhudan atu nisaelawan, u bilu sa nu belac a nisangaan . aku; u nisatin-pu-laan laecus haw? śąĎ:ś≤ĻÁāłť£üÁČ©šłćŚ•ĹŚźß? ising: u nicunusan tu huwa-siy a simal, ucelak a simal sipisa tin-pu-la ocuwa ku laecus saw? aku:u ciyaw-ke-li milaecus tu u dip haw? śąĎ:Ś∑ßŚÖčŚäõŚįćśąĎśúČŚģ≥Śóé? ising: hiyhiyhiy, u kekea lihum sa amana pawaneng ‚Ä¶ŚŹ™Ť¶ĀšłćŚä†Á≥Ė. aku; mingaduy kapah ku ka-ku nu udip haw/ śąĎ:śłłś≥≥ŚįćŤļęśĚźśúČŚ•ĹŤôēŚóé? ising; anu mingaduy kapah ku udup nu ka-ku, pacuyakui kakumay tu cin-yi. aku; misakapah tu ka-ku- nu udip u tatelungen haw? śąĎ:Ś°ĎťÄ†ťęĒŚěčťáćŤ¶ĀŚóé? ising; hey, "masakimuluay" u ka-ku tu! sakadaheked tu anu kaiyan ku kan atu nikan tu nika patelac sadikuday sa, ya sipun a ising sakamu sa: śúÄŚĺĆ,śó•śú¨ťÜęÁĒüÁłĹÁĶźťĀď: hani, u nikaudip caay kaw kinacacay micumud i lala' a nupi liw-ku, siwalen ku udip a misaselic‚Ä¶. dikeca tu tubilu cacay alima mudikec tu ciyaw-ke-li‚Ä¶ mamin t uku u dip a cu-kay-masan, mapatay nu ngelu', tanutuwasa mu "u.hu"nikaudip aku sakanawlan" sidumahan muka tu kakaydihan nisu, a mapatay kisu, amana palutatenga tu kamu nu paprluay pahengaday tisuwan! ya mikingkiway tu sakaduba a kikay, lima idaw ku sepat mapatay tu mulatlatay tu udip mikingkiway lima idaw ku pitu mapatay tu Kitakit u sakapahay ku udip sepat idaw ku cacay mapatay tu Kitakit u matinengay tu mutukuday ci malatuna enem bataan mapatay tu sisašĹÜśėĮ mikingkiway tu ken-te-ci mayseng kaudip siwa idaw ku sepat ku nikausip Nutella mikingkiway walu idaw ku walu mapatay dateneg may, mikingkiway tu tabaku ci uen-se-tun cacay asubu idaw ku tusa mapatay u ya-pin mikingkiway nay maninel mapatay cacay lasubu idaw ku sabatu enem kumihcaan mapatay ci sin-ni-se mikingkiway siwa idaw ku walu mapatay 9. . Inaising naming hican nuheni matineng tu nika mayseng nikaudip usadikuday a heci sa? u palawil tatebutsa, nika tusa amihcaan kunikaudip, u bilanga sa caay kasaungay, sepat a lasubu kuni kaudip. Sisa,pahanhan ni, sadep‚Ä¶.sadep han, mukan misalama lipahak, salihalay hank u nikaudip. śČÄšĽ•,šľĎśĀĮšłÄšłč,ŚÜ∑ťĚú‚Ä¶ . sadikuday sa mapatay tu.šĹÜśúÄŚĺĆťāĄśėĮśúÉś≠ĽÁöĄ.
S.PHON: u sakajdińßan naku kinaisiŇč! *******! kakir~…ĺiman aku;isiŇč, u t…ôŇčir~…ĺ aku anumir~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu udip sa tanaju Ē~ ° kuni kaudip saan ńßaw, tat…ôŇča ńßaw? *: ? nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan isiŇč; amana par~…ĺawp…ôs tu tuki i nipir~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu udip, anu mańßida sa mabaju Ē~ °. smir~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu udip kar~…ĺamkam ku nitat…ôbut nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶aj pakat…ôn…ôs kuni kaudip, mańßida anu kar~…ĺamkam kuni pa ¶ir~…ĺir~…ĺ isu tu kadud…ôŇč sa ¶ kar~…ĺamkam map…ô ¶i tu ku kadid…ôŇč **: ? anu majdińß matjs…ôŇč kunikaudip sa, kabi tu kar~…ĺańßukam! amu; mańßi ¶a sataŇč ńßan kunika tupańß? *: ? isiŇč: u ¶aaj. u budu a …ôpańß. paj-r~…ĺan-ti nu ńß…ô ¶i amin nińßudńßudan atu nisa…ôr~…ĺawan, u bir~…ĺu sa nu b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a nisaŇčaan . aku; u nisatin-pu-r~…ĺaan r~…ĺa…ô ¶us ńßaw? *:*******? isiŇč: u ni ¶unusan tu ńßuwa-sij a simar~…ĺ, u ¶…ôr~…ĺak a simar~…ĺ sipisa tin-pu-r~…ĺa o ¶uwa ku r~…ĺa…ô ¶us saw? aku:u ¶ijaw-k…ô-r~…ĺi mir~…ĺa…ô ¶us tu u dip ńßaw? *:********? isiŇč: ńßijńßijńßij, u k…ôk…ôa r~…ĺińßum sa amana pawan…ôŇč ******. aku; miŇčaduj kapańß ku ka-ku nu udip ńßaw/ *:*********? isiŇč; anu miŇčaduj kapańß ku udup nu ka-ku, pa ¶ujakui kakumaj tu ¶in-ji. aku; misakapańß tu ka-ku- nu udip u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôn ńßaw? *:*******? isiŇč; ńß…ô, "masakimur~…ĺuaj" u ka-ku tu! sakadańß…ôk…ôd tu anu kaijan ku kan atu nikan tu nika pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ sadikudaj sa, ja sipun a isiŇč sakamu sa: **,*******: ńßani, u nikaudip ¶aaj kaw kina ¶a ¶aj mi ¶umud i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a nupi r~…ĺiw-ku, siwar~…ĺ…ôn ku udip a misas…ôr~…ĺi ¶*. dik…ô ¶a tu tubir~…ĺu ¶a ¶aj ar~…ĺima mudik…ô ¶ tu ¶ijaw-k…ô-r~…ĺi* mamin t uku u dip a ¶u-kaj-masan, mapataj nu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, tanutuwasa mu "u.ńßu"nikaudip aku sakanawr~…ĺan" sidumańßan muka tu kakajdińßan nisu, a mapataj kisu, amana par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu kamu nu paprr~…ĺuaj pańß…ôŇčadaj tisuwan! ja mikiŇčkiwaj tu sakaduba a kikaj, r~…ĺima idaw ku s…ôpat mapataj tu mur~…ĺatr~…ĺataj tu udip mikiŇčkiwaj r~…ĺima idaw ku pitu mapataj tu kitakit u sakapańßaj ku udip s…ôpat idaw ku ¶a ¶aj mapataj tu kitakit u matin…ôŇčaj tu mutukudaj ¶i mar~…ĺatuna …ôn…ôm bataan mapataj tu sisa** mikiŇčkiwaj tu k…ôn-t…ô- ¶i majs…ôŇč kaudip siwa idaw ku s…ôpat ku nikausip nut…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa mikiŇčkiwaj war~…ĺu idaw ku war~…ĺu mapataj dat…ôn…ôg maj, mikiŇčkiwaj tu tabaku ¶i u…ôn-s…ô-tun ¶a ¶aj asubu idaw ku tusa mapataj u ja-pin mikiŇčkiwaj naj manin…ôr~…ĺ mapataj ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu idaw ku sabatu …ôn…ôm kumińß ¶aan mapataj ¶i sin-ni-s…ô mikiŇčkiwaj siwa idaw ku war~…ĺu mapataj *. . inaisiŇč namiŇč ńßi ¶an nuńß…ôni matin…ôŇč tu nika majs…ôŇč nikaudip usadikudaj a ńß…ô ¶i sa? u par~…ĺawir~…ĺ tat…ôbutsa, nika tusa amińß ¶aan kunikaudip, u bir~…ĺaŇča sa ¶aaj kasauŇčaj, s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu kuni kaudip. sisa,pańßanńßan ni, sad…ôp*.sad…ôp ńßan, mukan misar~…ĺama r~…ĺipańßak, sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßank u nikaudip. **,****,*** . sadikudaj sa mapataj tu.********.
S.FORM: u sakaydihan naku kinaising! śąĎŤ∂ÖśĄõťÄôŚÄčťÜęÁĒü! kakiliman aku;ising, u tengil aku anumilatlat tu udip sa tanayu' kuni kaudip saan haw, tatenga haw? śąĎ: ? nilaculan ising; amana palawpes tu tuki i nipilatlat tu udip, anu mahida sa mabayu'. smilatlat tu udip kalamkam ku nitatebut nu balucu' cay pakatenes kuni kaudip, mahida anu kalamkam kuni pacilil isu tu kadudeng sac kalamkam mapeci tu ku kadideng ťÜęÁĒü: ? anu maydih matyseng kunikaudip sa, kabi tu kalahukam! amu; mahica satang han kunika tupah? śąĎ: ? ising: u caay. u budu a epah. Pay-lan-ti nu heci amin nihudhudan atu nisaelawan, u bilu sa nu belac a nisangaan . aku; u nisatin-pu-laan laecus haw? śąĎ:ś≤ĻÁāłť£üÁČ©šłćŚ•ĹŚźß? ising: u nicunusan tu huwa-siy a simal, ucelak a simal sipisa tin-pu-la ocuwa ku laecus saw? aku:u ciyaw-ke-li milaecus tu u dip haw? śąĎ:Ś∑ßŚÖčŚäõŚįćśąĎśúČŚģ≥Śóé? ising: hiyhiyhiy, u kekea lihum sa amana pawaneng ‚Ä¶ŚŹ™Ť¶ĀšłćŚä†Á≥Ė. aku; mingaduy kapah ku ka-ku nu udip haw/ śąĎ:śłłś≥≥ŚįćŤļęśĚźśúČŚ•ĹŤôēŚóé? ising; anu mingaduy kapah ku udup nu ka-ku, pacuyakui kakumay tu cin-yi. aku; misakapah tu ka-ku- nu udip u tatelungen haw? śąĎ:Ś°ĎťÄ†ťęĒŚěčťáćŤ¶ĀŚóé? ising; hey, "masakimuluay" u ka-ku tu! sakadaheked tu anu kaiyan ku kan atu nikan tu nika patelac sadikuday sa, ya sipun a ising sakamu sa: śúÄŚĺĆ,śó•śú¨ťÜęÁĒüÁłĹÁĶźťĀď: hani, u nikaudip caay kaw kinacacay micumud i lala' a nupi liw-ku, siwalen ku udip a misaselic‚Ä¶. dikeca tu tubilu cacay alima mudikec tu ciyaw-ke-li‚Ä¶ mamin t uku u dip a cu-kay-masan, mapatay nu ngelu', tanutuwasa mu "u.hu"nikaudip aku sakanawlan" sidumahan muka tu kakaydihan nisu, a mapatay kisu, amana palutatenga tu kamu nu paprluay pahengaday tisuwan! ya mikingkiway tu sakaduba a kikay, lima idaw ku sepat mapatay tu mulatlatay tu udip mikingkiway lima idaw ku pitu mapatay tu Kitakit u sakapahay ku udip sepat idaw ku cacay mapatay tu Kitakit u matinengay tu mutukuday ci malatuna enem bataan mapatay tu sisašĹÜśėĮ mikingkiway tu ken-te-ci mayseng kaudip siwa idaw ku sepat ku nikausip Nutella mikingkiway walu idaw ku walu mapatay dateneg may, mikingkiway tu tabaku ci uen-se-tun cacay asubu idaw ku tusa mapatay u ya-pin mikingkiway nay maninel mapatay cacay lasubu idaw ku sabatu enem kumihcaan mapatay ci sin-ni-se mikingkiway siwa idaw ku walu mapatay 9. . Inaising naming hican nuheni matineng tu nika mayseng nikaudip usadikuday a heci sa? u palawil tatebutsa, nika tusa amihcaan kunikaudip, u bilanga sa caay kasaungay, sepat a lasubu kuni kaudip. Sisa,pahanhan ni, sadep‚Ä¶.sadep han, mukan misalama lipahak, salihalay hank u nikaudip. śČÄšĽ•,šľĎśĀĮšłÄšłč,ŚÜ∑ťĚú‚Ä¶ . sadikuday sa mapatay tu.šĹÜśúÄŚĺĆťāĄśėĮśúÉś≠ĽÁöĄ.
S.PHON: u sakajdińßan naku kinaisiŇč! *******! kakir~…ĺiman aku;isiŇč, u t…ôŇčir~…ĺ aku anumir~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu udip sa tanaju Ē~ ° kuni kaudip saan ńßaw, tat…ôŇča ńßaw? *: ? nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan isiŇč; amana par~…ĺawp…ôs tu tuki i nipir~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu udip, anu mańßida sa mabaju Ē~ °. smir~…ĺatr~…ĺat tu udip kar~…ĺamkam ku nitat…ôbut nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° ¶aj pakat…ôn…ôs kuni kaudip, mańßida anu kar~…ĺamkam kuni pa ¶ir~…ĺir~…ĺ isu tu kadud…ôŇč sa ¶ kar~…ĺamkam map…ô ¶i tu ku kadid…ôŇč **: ? anu majdińß matjs…ôŇč kunikaudip sa, kabi tu kar~…ĺańßukam! amu; mańßi ¶a sataŇč ńßan kunika tupańß? *: ? isiŇč: u ¶aaj. u budu a …ôpańß. paj-r~…ĺan-ti nu ńß…ô ¶i amin nińßudńßudan atu nisa…ôr~…ĺawan, u bir~…ĺu sa nu b…ôr~…ĺa ¶ a nisaŇčaan . aku; u nisatin-pu-r~…ĺaan r~…ĺa…ô ¶us ńßaw? *:*******? isiŇč: u ni ¶unusan tu ńßuwa-sij a simar~…ĺ, u ¶…ôr~…ĺak a simar~…ĺ sipisa tin-pu-r~…ĺa o ¶uwa ku r~…ĺa…ô ¶us saw? aku:u ¶ijaw-k…ô-r~…ĺi mir~…ĺa…ô ¶us tu u dip ńßaw? *:********? isiŇč: ńßijńßijńßij, u k…ôk…ôa r~…ĺińßum sa amana pawan…ôŇč ******. aku; miŇčaduj kapańß ku ka-ku nu udip ńßaw/ *:*********? isiŇč; anu miŇčaduj kapańß ku udup nu ka-ku, pa ¶ujakui kakumaj tu ¶in-ji. aku; misakapańß tu ka-ku- nu udip u tat…ôr~…ĺuŇč…ôn ńßaw? *:*******? isiŇč; ńß…ô, "masakimur~…ĺuaj" u ka-ku tu! sakadańß…ôk…ôd tu anu kaijan ku kan atu nikan tu nika pat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ sadikudaj sa, ja sipun a isiŇč sakamu sa: **,*******: ńßani, u nikaudip ¶aaj kaw kina ¶a ¶aj mi ¶umud i r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a nupi r~…ĺiw-ku, siwar~…ĺ…ôn ku udip a misas…ôr~…ĺi ¶*. dik…ô ¶a tu tubir~…ĺu ¶a ¶aj ar~…ĺima mudik…ô ¶ tu ¶ijaw-k…ô-r~…ĺi* mamin t uku u dip a ¶u-kaj-masan, mapataj nu Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ °, tanutuwasa mu "u.ńßu"nikaudip aku sakanawr~…ĺan" sidumańßan muka tu kakajdińßan nisu, a mapataj kisu, amana par~…ĺutat…ôŇča tu kamu nu paprr~…ĺuaj pańß…ôŇčadaj tisuwan! ja mikiŇčkiwaj tu sakaduba a kikaj, r~…ĺima idaw ku s…ôpat mapataj tu mur~…ĺatr~…ĺataj tu udip mikiŇčkiwaj r~…ĺima idaw ku pitu mapataj tu kitakit u sakapańßaj ku udip s…ôpat idaw ku ¶a ¶aj mapataj tu kitakit u matin…ôŇčaj tu mutukudaj ¶i mar~…ĺatuna …ôn…ôm bataan mapataj tu sisa** mikiŇčkiwaj tu k…ôn-t…ô- ¶i majs…ôŇč kaudip siwa idaw ku s…ôpat ku nikausip nut…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺa mikiŇčkiwaj war~…ĺu idaw ku war~…ĺu mapataj dat…ôn…ôg maj, mikiŇčkiwaj tu tabaku ¶i u…ôn-s…ô-tun ¶a ¶aj asubu idaw ku tusa mapataj u ja-pin mikiŇčkiwaj naj manin…ôr~…ĺ mapataj ¶a ¶aj r~…ĺasubu idaw ku sabatu …ôn…ôm kumińß ¶aan mapataj ¶i sin-ni-s…ô mikiŇčkiwaj siwa idaw ku war~…ĺu mapataj *. . inaisiŇč namiŇč ńßi ¶an nuńß…ôni matin…ôŇč tu nika majs…ôŇč nikaudip usadikudaj a ńß…ô ¶i sa? u par~…ĺawir~…ĺ tat…ôbutsa, nika tusa amińß ¶aan kunikaudip, u bir~…ĺaŇča sa ¶aaj kasauŇčaj, s…ôpat a r~…ĺasubu kuni kaudip. sisa,pańßanńßan ni, sad…ôp*.sad…ôp ńßan, mukan misar~…ĺama r~…ĺipańßak, sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßank u nikaudip. **,****,*** . sadikudaj sa mapataj tu.********.
